## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7f0ccecb4256dbddeee29b3c493b365a4d3cd5b23a204482fe89a97c45aa6047)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'docontrol-mcp' @ 999.0.0 (pypi) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
